tagline: A farm to grow with up to 6 friends
donate: ☕ Support the game with a donation
auth.name: Farmer name
farms.empty: You have no farms yet. Create one or join with a code!
farms.hint: Share your farm code so up to 5 friends can play with you.
loading.waking: Waking up the server (free tier)... may take ~1 min the first time.
shop.title: 🏪 Bob's Seed Shop
shop.chickenDesc: lays 1 egg per day (egg sells for 50)
shop.coopDesc: houses your chickens and their eggs
build.place: Click to place · ESC to cancel
build.outside: Head back to the farm — building starts automatically once you leave.
craft.title: 🔨 Crafting Bench
craft.fenceDesc: fence — select it in the hotbar and click on grass to place it
craft.swordDesc: melee weapon, short range, high damage
craft.shieldDesc: reduces damage taken from monsters while equipped
craft.rodDesc: select it and click on water (pond or ocean) to fish
craft.netDesc: select it and click on grass in the Forest to catch bugs
quest.title: 📋 Notice Board
quest.hint: Deliver what's requested for coins — a new request appears afterward.
progress.title: 📖 Vale Verde Progress
progress.hint: What the farm has discovered so far — it's co-op, it counts for everyone.
intro.title: A Letter From Grandma
intro.p1: Dear one, if you're reading this, you've finally made it to Greenvale. This land was my home for almost sixty years, and now it's yours.
intro.p2: It won't be easy at first — the fields are overgrown, the old mine out by the quarry has been forgotten, and folks say something stirs down in its depths. But this land is generous to those who tend it. And the valley is more than just the farm: there's Port Vale across the road, a forest full of life just to the north, and the sea to the south.
intro.p3: Call your friends. A farm grows faster with company — and Greenvale has always been that kind of place, people helping people.

objectives.full_collection.title: Full Collection
objectives.full_collection.desc: Discover everything Greenvale has to offer
progress.mineHint: The mine has 100 levels — the deeper you go, the rarer the ore and the tougher the monsters.
bin.title: 📦 Shipping Bin
bin.hint: Put items here — payment arrives when everyone sleeps.
sleep.title: 💤 Sleeping...
day.passedOut: You passed out and woke up with low energy...
err.no_energy: Out of energy! Go to sleep.
err.can_empty: Watering can is empty — refill at the pond!
err.wrong_season: That seed doesn't grow this season.
err.wrong_tool: Wrong tool — use the axe on trees and the pickaxe on rocks.
err.no_animal_space: No room in the coop (max 6 chickens per coop).
err.need_egg_money: You need 100 coins to buy a chicken.
err.need_coop: Build a coop first (Build tab in the shop).
err.bad_spot: Can't build here — pick a flat, clear spot.
err.need_bench: Get closer to the crafting bench (near the house).
err.need_board: Get closer to the notice board (in the plaza).
err.quest_missing_items: You don't have enough items for this request.
err.farm_not_found: Farm not found. Check the code.
err.out_of_range: Too far — get closer to the monster.
err.fainted: You fainted in the mine and were carried home...
err.stairs_hidden: The stairs are still hidden — mine the rocks to find them.
